There are tons of racing wheels available at this price point, but I don't think many would be able to provide all the same features. The gear shifter is separate so if you want to use it you can connect it. The pedals are good, but they are a bit to close to each other so I end up using one foot per pedal. When connecting to a console, we need to connect a controller to the USB port provided behind the wheel.Now for the performance, the wheel when connected to the PC runs by default in D-Input mode, which has very precise control and all the buttons are available to configure. One feature missing is vibration, but being only rumble I didn't miss it much.Forza 4,5 when purchased on steam didn't work with the steering, as I had a XBOX gamepass I downloaded and tried them, and the wheel works with both games which is surprising as I expected the same version on both stores. Gamepass is available for 1 month free if you've not already claimed it, so you could always test it out and cancel the subscription.Assetto Corsa Competizione was quite enjoyable, with the precision steering and no problems at all. Use a VR headset and the experience is on another level.There is a X-input mode which can be activated by holding down the home button and the purple led turns to orange. The games detect the wheel as a controller and it isn't as precise. But you get vibration feedback in this mode. This is more for arcade play than simulation racing.PS4, it worked without a hitch, I played Gran turismo, and the controls were very accurate. Vibration feedback sadly stopped working as soon as the PS4 updated the System Software. Not sure why Sony did that, but as of version 10.01 there is no vibration feedback support on the Nitho Drive Pro One.It's a great wheel, responsive and well built. I enjoyed playing with it, and I'm using the wheel on Windows 11.Read more

Let's start with the good things:Super fast delivery, good packaging and good product quality, good materials used in manufacturing the product, steering super smooth, good mounting options. Support team honest and direct.And now the consThe D-input does not have any vibration or force feedback. It's not given in the description and plus there were no reviews for the product when I brought them. hence I never knew how the product would be. It took a longer than usual time to setup because I was thinking that i must be doing something wrong because there were no vibrations in the game. After a chat with the support team, i came to know that it does not support vibration when in D-input mode(which gives you acess to all the buttons).After this shock that i may never be able to use all the 28 buttons, i switched to x-input. Now the x-input indeed does have vibrations on, the issue is that it has a big dead zone.(meaning steering input won't recognise a turn till u turn in atleast 15-20 degrees to either side) which makes it basically unplayable.There are no drivers or mod that will make it work.Also there is no return policy for this item. I can replace it but will get the same unusable model.So now I have basically a junk piece sitting at my home worth 10 grandIf there is no vibration in the steering in the d-input mode, it should have been clearly stated in the description. It's sad that i had to write a first review of a product like this. It pains my heart as this review may hamper the sales of this model, but what is true is true.Kudos to the support team who were responsive and technically same and very honestIf you are taking it for simracing, please choose a better option, save and then take a better oneIf you are taking it for arcade gaming, please choose a cheaper option, there are many available in the market with the exact same configurationI was using it on windows 10. I am not sure how well it will perform on xbox or PS or Neitendo.Read more

I recently purchased a new 1.5-ton air conditioning system for my 10x15 ft room, and I am thoroughly impressed! This AC is absolutely perfect for the room size, providing rapid and efficient cooling. Within a short time, my room transforms into a comfortable oasis, which is exactly what I needed.At its price point, I wholeheartedly believe this AC offers exceptional value for money. It strikes a fantastic balance, delivering powerful cooling without burdening you with unnecessary "smart" features that often inflate the cost and aren't truly essential for everyday use. For those seeking a budget-friendly option that doesn't compromise on core performance, this is an excellent choice.The installation process was surprisingly smooth and hassle-free, which is always a relief with new appliance purchases. However, it's crucial for prospective buyers to be aware of the installation costs. The base installation fee is ₹1500 + GST. Be prepared for additional charges for extra components that might be required, such as an outdoor unit stand, extra water drain pipes, or additional copper piping. These aren't included in the base installation, so factor them into your overall budget.Finally, while the company might claim the unit is stabilizer-free, I strongly recommend investing in a voltage stabilizer for added safety and to protect your new appliance in the long run. It's a small additional investment that can prevent potential issues.Overall, if you're looking for an efficient, no-frills, and budget-conscious air conditioning solution for a similar room size, I highly recommend this unit. It delivers on its promise of quick and effective cooling, making it a truly smart purchase.Read more

We needed an AC asap, stores like Croma, Vijay sales and Reliance we taking longer to deliver the unit and their technician would have come in 3-5 days.Sunday 1am, we placed the order and on Wednesday by 11am i received the product.Then, I reached out to amazon support and a madam there helped me to connect with the nearby  Voltas Service center.By 4pm, my AC is working.Best price and the fastest.Voltas is a trusted brand and we got a 1.5 ton for 26k whereas the best in market Croma was only able to offer a Voltas 1.3 ton for 27kFew things to note,1- buy 3m drainpipe yourself as the compnay is charging 400 for a basic pipe which honestly is inferior in quality as compared to the one I bought from blinkit for Rs150, brand - lifelong.2- purchase the wall bracket stand yourself, it costs 450 from amazon whereas for a similar non branded stand, the company installation charge is around Rs1000.3- buy a well insulation coated copper pipe by yourself beforehand. The company charged 450 per foot (nomial market price) for a local copper pipe which is not as well covered as the one which comes along the unit from the company.You can purchase this by weight at the wholesaler shop.4- Already buy a 16A plug as the company is not providing a small detail like this and neither is the installation technician carrying it.* something VOLTAS can do better is to provide 15ft copper pipe option, include drainpipe, a 16A plug in the box,  maybe the wall clips and white tape aswell.Basically work on making the customer's experience easy and train the installation technicians better by making them aware of cleaning after the job or being polite in not littering my place.Something that is a basic practise in the west and we can learn good things."Small details matter"Hope this helps!Read more

I am trying to summarise this in few points:-1. This one is my 3rd AC in my apartment, and first from Daikin, that to from online platform (previous ones were from Hitachi). I shall suggest go for an window AC for its sheer longevity and ease of use and service. But if not possible then go for split unit and Daikin is a fair choice.2. This one is for my one of my kid's room of 105 sqft. The IDU and HDU is very sturdy for its price reference and relatively large in size and can be compared to an 1 ton AC.3. It's a non inverter AC thus, compressor doesn't work all the time and less fault prone without the PCB and electronics, still very energy efficient. It consumed ~4 units for 11 pm to 6 am operation yesterday. It cools the room within 10 minutes.4. Their Installation charges are quite steep but Daikin sent me a rate chart in advance. Technician Adil was efficient and humble and done a good job. Unlike other brands In Daikin the power goes to HDU first and a 4 core wire comes back to IDU. So please keep in mind that, this wire is completely chargeable over and above Installation charges.Read more
